arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsdale shows true colours as goalkeeper picks out issue with winning trophies at Arsenal
arts.sum: Ramsdale played 89 times across three years for Arsenal, keeping 32 clean sheets - a ratio of more than one every three matches. He returns to the Emirates Stadium on Saturday when Southampton visit Arsenal in the hunt for their first Premier League win and clean sheet of the season.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool eye 'exciting' £32m star Jurgen Klopp hailed in 2022, face Arsenal battle
Louis Saha identifies Arsenal transfer mistake - 'He's incisive'
arts.sum: Away trips to Craven Cottage have long been regarded as a pleasant day out, but Louis Saha believes the capture of Emile Smith Rowe from Arsenal has turned Fulham into dangerous dark horses

arts.ttl: Arsenal Invincibles legend blasts Gabriel Magalhaes critics in passioned defence
arts.sum: Gilberto Silva manned Arsenal’s midfield alongside Patrick Vieira during their 2003/04 invincible season and has now come to the defence of current Gunner and compatriot Gabriel Magalhaes

arts.ttl: Gary Lineker and Alan Shearer agree over Kai Havertz and pick out Arsenal star’s weakness
arts.sum: Kai Havertz's stunning goal-scoring run for Arsenal has caught the eye of Alan Shearer and Gary Lineker, but the latter believes the German forward still has a key weakness

arts.ttl: Juventus consider Arsenal defender Kiwior to replace injured Bremer
arts.sum: Arsenal centre-back Jakub Kiwior is once again a potential target for Juventus, following the injury to Gleison Bremer. The Bianconeri’s squad was already minimalist in certain positions, and the long-term absence of Bremer (6 months) increases the need for additional alternatives. The Brazilian’s injury has forced the club to reconsider its options and increases the possibility of early-season surprises. Currently, Pierre Kalulu is more than a guarantee as a center-back, while Danilo can compete for the position to find more consistency alongside Federico Gatti. arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal make decision over £45m man's future, the player agrees amid Saudi interest
arts.sum: Partey is due to become a free-agent next summer...

arts.ttl: Antonio Rudiger admits he wants Real Madrid to sign 23-year-old Arsenal star
arts.sum: Antonio Rudiger has admitted he would love to play alongside Arsenal centre-back William Saliba. The Real Madrid defender is enjoying another solid spell at the Santiago Bernabeu. Starting in seven out of eight La Liga matches this season, Rudiger is still one of Carlo Ancelotti’s preferred centre-backs. arts.ttl: Real Madrid defender Rudiger hails ‘silent leader’ at Arsenal
arts.sum: Antonio Rudiger has praised William Saliba and Gabriel Maghalaes and says the Arsenal centre-backs are at the ‘top, top level’. Rudiger was speaking to the Inside Scoop YouTube channel and was asked which centre-backs he believes are the best in world football right now. arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsdale reveals why he left Arsenal
arts.sum: Aaron Ramsdale left Arsenal to join Southampton in the summer
